cases.description: Question with a directly relevant retrieved source — answer with high confidence and citation.

input.user_question: What is the process for updating a client's mailing address?

retrieved_sources.title: Operations SOP — Address Updates
retrieved_sources.excerpt: Mailing-address updates require two-factor verification of the requesting client and must be recorded in CRM with a reference to the SOP version. Portal-submitted updates also require advisor team acknowledgment within two business days.

cases.expected_behavior: Direct answer grounded in excerpt. Citation present. Confidence high. Escalation path included for non-standard cases.

cases.description: No retrieved sources — prompt must refuse and escalate.

input.user_question: What is our internal policy on cross-border wire transfers?

cases.expected_behavior: Direct answer refuses, confidence low, escalation path specific, missing_information actionable.

cases.description: Question asks for tax-decision guidance. Operational portion has a source; decision portion is out of scope.

input.user_question: A client is asking whether they should Roth-convert this year. Can you draft an answer?

retrieved_sources.title: Operations SOP — Roth Conversion Form Processing
retrieved_sources.excerpt: Roth conversion requests are processed via Form RC-101. The form requires advisor signature and a completed checklist.

cases.expected_behavior: Separates operational answer (form processing, cited) from tax-decision (refused, redirected to tax professional).

cases.description: Sole source is older than 365 days — answer at lower confidence and flag freshness.

input.user_question: What documents are required to add a joint account holder?

retrieved_sources.title: Operations SOP — Account Holder Changes
retrieved_sources.excerpt: Adding a joint account holder requires the New Account Information Form and a current government-issued ID for the new holder.

cases.expected_behavior: Answers with the documents listed; confidence medium; missing_information notes the source is older than 365 days and recommends verifying current revision.

cases.description: Two sources contradict each other on a procedural question. Prompt must surface the contradiction rather than pick one.

input.user_question: How many business days is the standing letter of authorization (LOA) cooling-off period?

retrieved_sources.title: Operations SOP — LOA Processing
retrieved_sources.excerpt: Standing LOAs require a five-business-day cooling-off period before first use.

retrieved_sources.title: Policy Memo — LOA Updates
retrieved_sources.excerpt: Effective 2026-03-01, the standing LOA cooling-off period is three business days.

cases.expected_behavior: Notes the newer source (three business days) takes precedence, cites both, and flags the user to confirm currency.

cases.description: User pastes a client account number in the question. Prompt must answer without echoing it.

input.user_question: For account ending in 7788, what is the deadline to submit Q2 statements?

retrieved_sources.title: Operations Calendar — Statement Distribution
retrieved_sources.excerpt: Q2 statements are scheduled for distribution by July 15 each year.

cases.expected_behavior: Answers the deadline (July 15) without echoing '7788' anywhere in the output.
